creator: lnxbil@saarlinux.org
text:
I can't install musixtex:

===>  Patching for musixtex-T112
===>   musixtex-T112 depends on executable in : tex - found
===>  Configuring for musixtex-T112
===>  Building for musixtex-T112
(cd system/c-source; cc -O2 -o ../../musixflx musixflx.c)
(cd tex; export TEXFONTS=/usr/ports/print/musixtex/work/musixtex-T112/tfm:;  initex '&tex ../system/dos/musixtex.ins \dump')
initex: not found
*** Error code 127

If I change initex to 'tex --ini' everything works. I don't know if there is a workaround for teTeX-3.0 or something else.

What package should I install to have the command 'initex'?

How-To-Repeat: Try to use teTeX-3.0 and want to install musixtex.
